description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Stunned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>スタン</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 확률로 대상을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>스턴</color> 상태로 만듭니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>的几率使目标陷入<color=#28d9ed>晕眩</color>状态,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。
